title: Pot and Kettle
description: A primarily tech-based kitchen sink modpack with regions unexplored worldgen.
body:
![Pot and Kettle Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/007b197dedc6ada9a7d9c04ae7574268811ec5bf.png)
A Kitchen Sink Tech Modpack for Forge 1.20.1

![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/546347ef11bfa1bd815269ee738502d3c1ed7517.png) Pot and Kettle is a kitchen sink modpack with all your favourite tech mods, including: - Mekanism - EnderIO - Immersive Engineering - Create (with lots of addons) - Pneumaticraft To complement these tech mods there are a large number of different foods you can work on automating, with mods such as Farmer's Delight and Create: Food, as well as plenty of logistics solutions like Railcraft, Little Logistics, Refined Storage and Storage Drawers. If you like tech mods in any capacity, there will definitely be something in this pack for you, alongside plenty of decoration and exploration/adventure mods. ![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/546347ef11bfa1bd815269ee738502d3c1ed7517.png) ![promo image depicting a village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a8599afdbedcf2dc97e4287bec0a94c858ab617_0.webp) ![promo image depicting the a lively cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49af1dab5a70d480e74dd588aada5163a2ed85a6_0.webp) For a full list of included mods, check the dependencies of the files in the "versions" tab.
